prompt:
Goal: Create a polished corporate anniversary leadership poster for an automotive company, combining executive portrait photography, futuristic road imagery, and Chinese campaign typography.

Canvas: 16:9 horizontal poster, 1366×768 style composition, clean premium business aesthetic in cool blue, white, and navy gradients.

Layout: Place the main executive portrait on the right half, waist-up, occupying about 40% of the canvas. He is an East Asian middle-aged male CEO in a dark navy suit, white shirt, patterned blue tie, rimless glasses, short neatly combed black-and-gray hair, arms crossed, looking slightly upward and left with calm confidence. Behind him, use a giant translucent light-blue number “10” spanning the center-right background, with “TH” at the upper right of the number.

Left typography block: At the top left, small text reads “2016-2026 | 十年同行 驭见未来”. Below it, large bold headline text reads “2016-2026” and a larger Chinese title reads 十年同行. Under the headline, add a thin red accent line and a subheading reading 某某汽车并购十周年纪念. Add two small English subtitle lines beneath: “10TH ANNIVERSARY OF THE MERGER” and “A DECADE OF PARTNERSHIP, DRIVING THE FUTURE”.

Right identity block: To the left of the executive’s chest, add a short red horizontal line and the name 张远见, with smaller Chinese text beneath reading “董事长 & CEO”. Add a short two-line quote in small gray Chinese text: “十年同行，感谢伙伴与用户 / 一路相伴，向新而行。”

Background scene: Use a bright, airy corporate sky with soft lens flares and diagonal light streaks. Along the lower third, show a futuristic elevated highway curving from left to right with motion blur. Include exactly 1 dark blue electric SUV driving on the left-center road, low and sleek, slightly blurred to suggest speed. Add a faint distant city skyline on the far left horizon.

Bottom band: Add a deep navy gradient footer across the lower 18% of the poster. On the left side of the footer, include exactly 3 short lines of small white Chinese corporate copy describing the 2016 acquisition, 2026 anniversary, and future cooperation. On the right side of the footer, include exactly 2 white automotive brand logos separated by a multiplication sign: first a horizontal oval car emblem with the text “某某汽车 / MOUMOU AUTO”, then “×”, then a shield-like emblem with the text “某某汽车 / MOUMOU AUTO”.

Visual style: Premium Chinese enterprise event poster, executive leadership portrait, clean corporate technology design, realistic photography mixed with subtle 3D graphic elements, high contrast navy-and-white palette, refined spacing, crisp typography, elegant and authoritative.

Constraints: Use exactly 1 executive portrait, exactly 1 vehicle, exactly 1 giant translucent “10”, exactly 2 brand logos, and exactly 1 red accent line in the left text block. Keep all Chinese text sharp and legible. Do not add extra people, extra cars, QR codes, watermarks, or decorative clutter.
